source: Durbin & Koopman (2012), Time Series Analysis by State Space Methods, 2nd ed., section 2 (local level model). Series: the opening decade (1871-1880) of the annual Nile river flow at Aswan distributed with the book and R datasets::Nile. Parameters q=sigma^2_eta, r=sigma^2_eps at the book's local-level MLE (sigma^2_eps=15099, sigma^2_eta=1469.1). Filtered/smoothed outputs are the language-neutral contract reproduced by the first-principles recursion; independently anchored by the steady-state closed form and the scalar/matrix parity tests.
